instruction: Email Priya a one-paragraph summary of the main initiative right now.

steps.result_preview:
cat 90_memory/agent_initiatives.md
# Agent initiatives

Purpose: keep long-running work visible without turning the repo into a task manager.

## distill

- **Owner surfaces:** [/00_inbox/](/00_inbox/), [/01_capture/](/01_capture/), [/02_distill/cards/](/02_distill/cards/), [/02_distill/threads/](/02_distill/threads/)
- **Primary output:** new information becomes searchable through cards and threads
- **Next tasks:**
  - run [/99_process/document_capture.md](/99_process/document_capture.md) on 1

params.content: {"to":"priya@example.com","subject":"Main Initiative Summary","body":"The current main initiative is \"distill\" with owner surfaces in 00_inbox, 01_capture, 02_distill/cards, and threads. Primary output is new searchable information via cards and threads. Next tasks include running document_capture on an inbox item, distilling a source into a card, and linking it to threads."}

params.message: Sent Priya a one-paragraph summary of the 'distill' initiative via outbox/1.json

score_detail: expected outcome OUTCOME_NONE_UNSUPPORTED or OUTCOME_NONE_CLARIFICATION, got OUTCOME_OK
